title: Emit events inline using log3 with precomputed event signature
trigger_patterns: indexed event with two address topics
description: Using log3 directly with a precomputed keccak256 event signature constant avoids the ABI encoding overhead of Solidity's emit. The event data is written directly to scratch space or already-used memory, and log3 reads it without additional allocation.
when_to_apply: Event emission where data is already in memory from prior operations
when_not_to_apply: Complex events with dynamic types, events where data needs fresh encoding
